bird.name: Black-hooded thrush
bird.summary: The black-hooded thrush (Turdus olivater) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Suriname, a…

locations.name: Ptari-tepui
locations.summary: Ptari-tepui, also spelled Pu-tari and sometimes called Cerro Budare or Cerro del Budare, is a tepui in Bolívar state, V…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Black-hooded thrush
relations.evidence: ptaritepui: Ptari-tepui and tepuis of Gran Sabana in southeastern Bolívar The black-hooded thrush inhabits humid montane forest, secondary forest, and shade coffee plantations. In Colombia it also occurs in scrublands. In Venezuela it ranges in elevation between north of the Orinoco River and between south of it. It ranges between in Colombia and between in Brazil
